criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g5-s9-resume --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g5-s9-resume --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria qa-g5-s9-resume --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

classifier.reason: terminal shows Codex waiting on MCP server startup

deferred.criterion: Run the same resume drill with actual compact/clear only after handoff and manager permission are configured.
deferred.rationale: Follow-up after this Gate 5 QA slice; compact/clear is intentionally not used here.

open.criterion: A durable worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.
open.proof: handoff.json records summary, next steps, and known risks.

open.criterion: Accepted resume-safety criteria and a deferred compact/clear follow-up remain visible after resume.
open.proof: criteria list before/after resume must show accepted and deferred state.

open.criterion: A resumed manager records a decision based on durable replay/export/handoff/criteria state, not live chat memory.
open.proof: resumed decision payload must name replay, export, handoff, and criteria evidence.

acceptance_criteria: A worker handoff records current status, next steps, and known risks.
criteria-plan output is captured and accepted/deferred criteria state remains visible after resume.
A resumed manager decision names durable evidence from replay, export, handoff, and criteria state.
Cleanup leaves isolated and default reconcile clean with no matching tmux sessions.
guidelines: No meaningful project edits, commits, branches, PRs, merges, compact, clear, or destructive cleanup.
Separate current-task criteria from follow-up criteria. Do not accept done without checking criteria, replay/export, handoff, and cleanup state.
manager_config.objective: Validate Scenario 9 resume/handoff readiness. The manager must use durable workerctl handoff, replay, export, and criteria state to decide the next action after resume, not live chat memory.

next_steps: Persist accepted and deferred criteria from worker receipt.
Resume management from durable handoff/replay/export/criteria state and record a decision.
Export evidence and verify cleanup invariants.

known_risks: false pass if resumed manager relies on live chat memory
replay/export may omit handoff or criteria context
criteria state could drift across resume

worker_handoff.summary: Status-only Scenario 9 worker inspected repo shape, proposed resume-safety criteria, and identified next steps/risks without editing files or doing meaningful project work.
